metadata.description: Eser KUBALI's Claude Code plugin marketplace: grounded, repo-aware planning, audit/hardening, and agent delegation and orchestration tools for Claude Code.

plugins.name: qb
plugins.description: Repo-aware, gated, multi-step project planning workflow for Claude Code: master plan, assessment, phase decomposition, coverage/quality audit, and gated implementation. Produces English Planner-docs/; in-session and zero-setup.

plugins.name: planwright
plugins.description: Grounded codebase planning for AI coding agents, packaged for Claude Code: audits your repository and writes a verification-ready checkbox plan where every step is checkable.

plugins.name: external-agents
plugins.description: Run external coding-agent CLIs (agy, codex, optionally claude) as autonomous sub-agents from inside Claude Code. Dispatch one prompt to a single agent or fan it out to all in parallel, read-write by default (--read-only available), and collect every response inline.
